EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPointCollection5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that manipulate the vertices as lightweight point+attribute structures (VA - vertex attribute)

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("87C8DE06-D8B5-4F5D-BCD5-A27C3A994B07")]
public interface IPointCollection5 : IPointCollection4, IPointCollection3, IPointCollection2, IPointCollection
